name: Rabbit in White Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart casserole, melt butter over high heat for 1 minute.
2. Stir in onion, carrot, and celery to coat the rabbit pieces. Cook on high for an additional 2 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together salt, pepper, thyme, marjoram, chicken bouillon, vinegar, and white wine until well combined.
4. Place the rabbit pieces on top of the vegetable mixture in the casserole.
5. Pour the wine/seasoning mixture over both the vegetables and the rabbit pieces.
6. Cover and cook on high for 5 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and bake at 60% power for an additional 7 minutes.
8. Stir gently, then return to the oven (high) for an additional 5 minutes more.
9. Stir in sour cream and continue cooking for 5 more minutes until heated through.
10. Serve over buttered noodles.
